title: Flash Power Spray Mop Refills Bundle Value Pack, Lavender Refill Liquid 5 Litres (1.25 L x 4) & 1 Washable Pad
features: SAFE ON ALL FLOORS: The Flash Powermop refill liquid is safe to use on all finished floors, ensuring your surfaces are not damaged during cleaning.
DISSOLVES DIRT: The Flash Powermop refill liquid quickly dissolves dirt and prevents streaks and haze, providing a thorough clean.
QUICK DRY: The Flash Powermop refill liquid is a quick dry cleaning solution that easily dissolves dirt and prevents streaks and haze.
Traps dirt and grime deep in the pad so it doesn’t get pushed around
When dirty, simply throw the pad in the washing machine and reuse it
